g.text: Sandakan — AI Agentic RAG System Architecture

div.p: Ingestion (Write Path): Upload -> Job(Queued) -> mpsc -> IngestionWorker -> CompositeFileLoader -> TextSplitter(+split_segments for media) -> Embedder(dense) + SparseEmbedder(BM25) -> VectorStore.upsert_hybrid -> Job(Completed)

Retrieval (Read Path): Query -> Embedder(dense) [+ SparseEmbedder if hybrid] -> VectorStore.search [or search_hybrid -> RRF fusion] -> Token-budget ranking -> Augment prompt -> LlmClient -> SSE stream

Agentic Loop (ReAct): AgentChatRequest -> AgentService -> [Reason] LlmClient (tool_choice: auto) -> [Act] ToolRegistry.execute(tool_call) -> RagSearchAdapter | FsToolAdapter | WebSearch | MCP -> [Observe] append ToolResult to messages -> repeat until finish_reason=stop or max_iterations -> [Reflect] CriticEvaluator score (completeness, grounding, clarity) -> SSE stream progress events to client

Eval Background Worker: EvalOutbox(pending) -> FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED -> EvalWorker.process_entry() -> EvalMetrics.compute_faithfulness() (LLM-as-judge) -> EvalResult persisted -> outbox row -> done/failed

g.text: tokio · axum · sqlx · qdrant-client · serde · tracing · candle · symphonia · reqwest · tiktoken-rs · fnv · hurl
